arts.ttl: Why Chelsea fans are protesting as Roman Abramovich message sent again and Todd Boehly's role
arts.sum: Chelsea's Premier League finishes under Clearlake-Boehly are 12th and sixth, with anything from 10th to third still possible for this season. But why are Chelsea supporters taking this opportunity to protest?

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans stage protest against owners ahead of Southampton match
arts.sum: Around 200 supporters gathered outside Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Fans stage protest against Chelsea owners
arts.sum: Embed from Getty Images Chelsea fans have been protesting against the club’s owners outside Stamford Bridge ahead of tonight’s match against Southampton. Around 150 fans gathered, chanting “we want our Chelsea back” and singing the name of former owner Roman Abramovich. Many fans have been unhappy with the running of the club since the Todd […] The post Fans stage protest against Chelsea owners appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Furious Chelsea fans march with flares and banners in protest against 'c***' Todd Boehly and Clearlake Capital ahead of Southampton clash
arts.sum: Chelsea's form has tailed off desperately and a section of the fan-base came together on Tuesday night to direct their anger at Boehly and Clearlake Capital, who purchased the club in 2022.

arts.ttl: Report: Why Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka may not be sold to Borussia Dortmund this summer despite impressive start
arts.sum: Dortmund need to turn their season around quickly.

arts.ttl: 'He doesn't like': Marc Cucurella shares what Chelsea's Cole Palmer wishes club didn't do in training

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Southampton - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Yes, TNT Sports will be broadcasting the midweek round of fixtures in the Premier League, which will include Chelsea's match against the Saints. Chelsea's last win in the Premier League came against West Ham on February 3, and the Blues will want to claim another three points when they take on Southampton in the capital.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘compile list of 10 transfer targets’ as £25m star swaps agents to help deal get done
arts.athr: mirrornews@mirror.co.uk (Tom Sunderland, Harry Brent, Maria Ortega)
arts.sum: Chelsea are believed to be monitoring the progress of a River Plate wonderkid, with the player's new agent reportedly jetting into the UK to discuss a potential move

arts.ttl: Chelsea to complete €35m transfer on one condition
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will only be able to permanently sign Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka if they qualify for the Champions League, according to German media. Dortmund managed to secure a purchase option for Chukwuemka, but reports have varied regarding the exact amount that would have to be paid in the summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer target's new agent 'jets to London' as £25m release clause becomes clear
arts.sum: It's understood Subiabre cut ties with Herman Bernan when their contract expired, and ex-River Plate and Boca Juniors forward Caniggia is now calling the shots. As well as impressing at the U20 South American Championship, Subiabre has made his mark for River Plate's reserves.
